## SigMap commands

| When | Command |
|------|---------|
| Before answering a question about code | `sigmap ask "<your question>"` |
| After changing config or source dirs | `sigmap validate` |
| To verify an AI answer is grounded | `sigmap judge --response <file>` |

```
struct branch_case_output_impl
  static_assert(always_false_v<Case>, "Branch output marker requires pb::case_<Predicate>::then<Stage>")
struct join_output_impl
  static_assert(always_false_v<Join>, "Join output marker requires pb::join_node<Stage>")
struct join_validation_impl
  static_assert(always_false_v<Outputs>, "Join validation requires pb::branch_outputs<...> and pb::join_node<Stage>")
struct join_builder_validation_impl
  static_assert(always_false_v<Outputs>, "Join builder validation requires pb::branch_outputs<...> and a valid join stage")
struct branch_output_validation_impl
  static_assert(always_false_v<Outputs>, "Branch output validation requires pb::branch_outputs<...>")
struct branch_case_input_or_void
struct branch_node_input
struct branch_case
  static_assert(Stage<Predicate>, "Branch predicate is invalid: define input_type and bool-like output_type")
struct case_
struct branch_node
struct branch_outputs
struct join_node
  static_assert(Stage<JoinStage>, "Join stage is invalid: define input_type and output_type")
struct pipeline
struct pipeline_state
```
